input.old_string: 每 5 小時一則摘要傳到你手機 Slack：做了什麼／卡在哪／有沒有需要你決定的。（只報告，不會亂動任何東西）

① 早上 30 秒：看手機那則摘要

你會在 Slack 收到一則像這樣的訊息（範例）：

Slack · AI 隊友 → 你　早上 09:00
📋 今日摘要
✅ 做完：Spark MINI 破音問題，找到原因、開好 PR #51
🔧 進行中：把 67 張硬體便利貼整理成一張表（等你批准才動）
⛔ 卡住：PR #51 在等 Ken 看
🙋 需要你：有 2 件事要你點頭（見下面）

看

③ 開機時：選要接哪個工作

開機它會給你一張清單（範例）：

• 早上：看那則手機摘要（30 秒）
  • 白天：它 Slack 問你時，回「好」或「先不要」
  • 開機時：選要接哪個工作
  • 一週一次（可選）：打 /audit-review 看趨勢
每天晚上 8 點一則 AI 新聞 / 技術摘要傳到你手機 Slack：最近的 AI 大事、值得注意的新工具。（只報告、讓你跟上趨勢，不會亂動任何東西）

① 每晚 30 秒：看手機那則 AI 新聞摘要

每天晚上 8 點，你會在 Slack 收到一則像這樣的訊息（範例）：

Slack · AI 隊友 → 你　晚上 20:00
🧠 每日 AI 新聞 — 7/18
• 某家發表新的 AI 模型 — 一句話重點
  為什麼值得注意：⋯⋯　🔗 連結
• 一個好用的新 AI 開發工具 — 一句話重點
  為什麼值得注意：⋯⋯　🔗 連結

input.old_string: - **`0D8C:0033` 是通用 C-MEDIA 晶片**，一般 USB 音效卡/耳機也會回報同一組 ID → 不可讓它蓋過真正的 PG 裝置。updater 已改為 **PG VID 優先**，且先驗 Reactor BT Audio 再驗 Spark。
- **（2026-07-17 用戶確認）LIVE 的 audio PID/VID 不會再變**：因為那顆 audio 是 C-MEDIA 晶片，`0D8C:0033` 是晶片自己的 ID、**不隨韌體版本改變** → 當**穩定 anchor** 可靠。
- **（2026-07-17 用戶確認）LIVE 的 audio PID/VID 不會再變**：那顆是 **C-MEDIA USB audio 晶片**，`0D8C:0033` 是晶片自己的 ID、**不隨韌體版本改變** → 當**穩定 anchor** 可靠。但仍非 LIVE 專屬（見上一條），偵測仍要 PG VID 優先、避免一般音效卡誤判成 LIVE。

<result>I could not complete this upload, and the reason is a hard mechanical limit, not a transient error.

ERROR:
The `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Drive__create_file` tool only accepts file bytes inline (via `base64Content`, `textContent`, or the deprecated `content`) — there is no file-path, URL, chunked, or resumable upload option. I confirmed this against all available Drive/Box/Notion upload tools.

The target file is 1,020,290 bytes, and its base64 encoding is 1,360,388 characters (verified with `wc -c`). To call `create_file`, that entire 1.36-million-character string must appear verbatim as a single argument in my tool call. Tool-call arguments come from model output, and the per-turn output budget is on the order of tens of thousands of tokens — the base64 alone tokenizes to well over 300K tokens. It cannot be emitted in one turn, and a tool call cannot be streamed/split across turns. Producing a truncated string would upload a corrupt PDF, so I did not attempt it.

Additional confirmation: even reading the base64 back for transcription is blocked — the Read tool caps long-single-line files at ~25,000 characters shown.

What this means:
- Steps 1 (base64 encode) and 2 (load tools) succeeded.
- Step 3 (`create_file`) is not executable for a file this size via the available connector; no partial/retry helps.
- Steps 4 fields cannot be produced (FILE_ID / LINK / NAME / MIME / SIZE all unavailable).

This inline-base64 path only works for small files (rough ceiling ~140 KB PDF → ~190 KB base64). Viable ways to actually get this ~1 MB PDF into the user's Drive, none of which are available to me in this environment:
- The Google Drive REST API with a resumable/multipart upload reading the local file directly (would need OAuth creds; the local `mcp__google-drive__*` server has no binary-file-by-path upload either).
- Manual drag-and-drop / Drive desktop client by the user.

I stopped here rather than upload a truncated/corrupt file. If you want, point me at a Drive API token or a small-enough file and I can proceed.</result>

</task-notification>

<result>I have comprehensive coverage across all sources. Compiling findings now.

---

# How Positive Grid builds & runs bots / AI agents internally — READ-ONLY research findings

Nothing was posted, commented, created, or modified. Note: connector coverage was uneven — **Confluence/Rovo search is not available** on this instance (both `mcp__...__search` and CQL returned 403 "app not installed" / 404), and **Notion returned almost nothing relevant** (only a legacy "PG Bot" page). The substance came from **Slack, Google Drive, and JIRA**. I also deliberately withhold the live Telegram/bot **token secrets** I encountered (they appeared in search results); I reference those bots by name only.

---

## SLACK (primary source — richest evidence)

**Channels that define the internal AI/bot org:**
- **#ai-dev-lab** (C087C99REV9), founded by Nathan Chang 2025-01-06 — "公司 AI 開發實驗室…專注於自動化工作流程 (workflow)、AI Agent、工具整合…想要分享你的 n8n 流程？這裡就是最佳舞台". The central AI-automation community.
- **#ai-coding-agents** (C08ENFRA8JF), Chiyang 2025-02-24 — deep technical channel on agent harnesses, Claude Code, A2A, memory.
- Others: **#slack-dev-playground** (CATUWMT7B, purpose = "Channel for Slack tools/bots development"), #ai-tech-seeds, #ai-bootcamp, #ai-saas-monitor, #ai-assistant-的調教, #ai-prompt-and-practice, #bot-test, #my-bot-test.

**(a) Bots/agents already running + owners:**
- **Friday CLI** — PG's official personal-agent platform. npm package `@positive-grid/friday-cli`; commands `friday auth / install / soul edit / whois / upgrade` and `/friday` inside Claude Code; has an HTTP API (`/api/v1/sync`), a per-user persona file `~/.friday/SOUL.md`, and a contacts/`whois` directory mapping Slack↔email↔GitHub logins. Owner: **Calvin (CEO, U02GBAYHE)**. [permalink C08ENFRA8JF/p1746235360... "🚀 Friday CLI updates", 2026-05-03]. Calvin's **"Friday v2" beta** (#general, 2026-05-05, C0250SJHD/p1777915722768689): *"giving every PG employee their own personal AI agent… Not a chatbot. A 24/7 autonomous teammate… You can work with your own personal agent via Slack or CLI."* — **directly the two-way human↔AI chat pattern Alice is after.**
- **n8n bot** (Slack user U08PPFTQMB8) — posts workflow-exception alerts (e.g. "Sync Data from RDS to BQ") into #bot-test; links to a **self-hosted n8n at `localhost:5678`**.
- **"Josh Fernandez" bot** (U02BVF5UHTQ) — n8n **Cloud** automation (`positivegrid-it2.app.n8n.cloud`) posting to #eu-uk-price-checking-updates.
- **agent-hub** (n8n) — Spark's **production** AI-Tone routing now goes through "n8n 的 agent-hub" instead of the old AI Tone API service (#backend-issue, Lee Yen, 2026-07-17, C4H4P850X/p1784270713607609).
- **PG Bot** — legacy Slack app (also documented in Notion, see below) issuing license/entitlement codes.
- **desktop-rd agent** (Slack usergroup/bot S084P3YVC9K) referenced in Gary Hsieh's "AI Adoption Plan" minutes (#rd-desktop-app, 2025-09-26, C07PCCG3G/p1758871218649569): a roster of team agents — **Release Agent** (automates release notes/known-issues/CI-CD/Jira), **Orchestrator Agent**, **GUI Orchestrator**, **Headless Testing Agent**, **Frontend Agent**, plus JIRA automation.
- **BIAS-dev-agent** / **pg-stack** — GitHub-hosted agentic dev pipeline (org `Positive-LLC`), with CI running mock-vs-engine contract tests and "context-齊了才開工" gating hooks (#rd-desktop-app, Nathan, 2026-07-17, C07PCCG3G/p1784293549369399 and /p1784296574717509).

**(b)
